Notice Of Motion To Quash Service And Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-02-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Deputy Attorney General JULIANNE MOSSLER of Office of the Attorney General, Tel No. (415) 703-5746 appearing for Defendants Kamala Harris and John Chiang;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANTS KAMALA HARRIS AND JOHN CHIANG'S Motion To Quash Service And Demurrer To Complaint, the motion to quash is granted as to defendants Harris and Chiang. The demurrer is sustained without leave to amend because the action is time barred. No opposition filed. See CCP 430.10(e). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
